body:
## Summary

Fixes #27 by treating non-zero `gh` / `git` exits as real failures and retrying repository creation with a timestamp-suffixed name when the generated repository name already exists.

During CI verification this also uncovered a Windows-specific repository-upload bug: backslashes in Windows paths were not normalized, which caused repository uploads to copy into missing nested directories. That path normalization is fixed in this PR as well.

## How To Reproduce

1. Upload a log to a private repository for a given file path.
2. Re-run the same file path with `--only-repository --public`.
3. Before this PR, `gh repo create` returned `GraphQL: Name already exists on this account (createRepository)`, but the CLI still printed a successful public upload and pointed at the existing private repository.
4. After this PR, the CLI either fails honestly on command errors or retries with a unique public repository name when the failure is a name collision.

## Validation

- `bun test`
- `bun run check`
- Added library-level regression coverage for repeated `gh repo create` collision failures.
- Added library-level regression coverage for a successful retry after a single collision while preserving `--public`.
- Added Windows path-normalization coverage for backslash-separated file paths.
- GitHub Actions run `24886015374` is green across Ubuntu, macOS, Windows, lint, and changeset checks.

## Case Study And Evidence

- [Issue 27 case study](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-27-05a03800b7e1/docs/case-studies/issue-27/README.md)
- [Issue payload](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-27-05a03800b7e1/docs/case-studies/issue-27/issue-details.json)
- [Existing repository metadata](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-27-05a03800b7e1/docs/case-studies/issue-27/existing-repository.json)
- [Shell reproduction log](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-27-05a03800b7e1/docs/case-studies/issue-27/reproduction-shell.log)
- [command-stream reproduction log](https://github.com/link-foundation/gh-upload-log/blob/issue-27-05a03800b7e1/docs/case-studies/issue-27/reproduction-command-stream.log)
title: fix: handle repository name collisions without false public success
